crypto_intro_1: Malo a cryptocurrency aphulika ndi ndalama zadigitala zikwizikwi ndi ntchito zosiyanasiyana.
crypto_intro_2: Pomwe Bitcoin ndiyo yoyamba ndipo ndiyodziwika kwambiri, imasiyana kwambiri ndi zinthu zina za crypto.
crypto_intro_3: Tiyeni tiwunikenso kusiyana kwakukulu pakati pa Bitcoin ndi cryptocurrency zina.
point_1_summary_1: Njira ya Bitcoin yakhala yosintha kuyambira 2009, ikupereka malamulo odalirika omwe sangasinthidwe mosavuta. Ntchito zambiri za crypto zimasintha nthawi zonse.
point_2_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito pa netiweki yogawidwa kwenikweni ndi ma node zikwi makumi odziimira okha padziko lonse. Ntchito zambiri za crypto zimalamulira ndi mabungwe, makampani, kapena magulu ang'onoang'ono a opanga mapulogalamu.
point_3_summary_1: Bitcoin ili ndi malire olimba a ndalama 21 miliyoni yomwe idzakhaleko, zomwe zimapangitsa kukhala chuma chosakadwa kwambiri. Ntchito zambiri za crypto zili ndi kuchuluka kosatha kapena njira za kukwera.
point_4_summary_1: Bitcoin ili ndi cholinga chimodzi chosavuta: ndalama zadigitala zapakati pa anthu. Aliyense angamvetsetse ndi kuigwiritsa ntchito ndi chidziwitso choyambirira. Ntchito zambiri za crypto zimafuna chidziwitso chakuya cha teknoloji.
point_5_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwiritsa ntchito Proof of Work yomwe yayesedwa kwa zaka zopitirira 15 popanda kupambana kwa chitukuko. Ntchito zambiri za crypto zimagwiritsa ntchito njira zoyesedwa monga Proof of Stake.
point_6_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito ngati ndalama zadigitala - malo osungira chuma ndi njira yosinthiranira. Ma token ambiri a crypto ndi a ntchito za mapulatifomu apadera.
point_7_summary_1: Bitcoin imalimba mukaukiwa ndipo yapulumuka kwa mavuto onse. Ntchito zambiri za crypto ndi zofooka ndipo zimatha kugwa chifukwa cha malamulo, mavuto ateknikaili, kapena kugwa kwa msika.
point_8_summary_1: Bitcoin ilibe CEO, ilibe kampani yomwe ikuyichirikiza, ndipo ilibe malo ovutikira amodzi. Ntchito zambiri za crypto zimachirikizidwa ndi makampani a venture capital kapena zidalira makampani enieni.
